zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Elizabeth Everitt Averitt於1695年出生在美國羅得島時，她的父親John Everitt25歲，母親Sarah Welles22歲。她和Adam Sheffield至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1787年在美國北卡羅來納州摩爾享年92歲。

nameMeanings.name: Everitt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Everett
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English personal names Everard and Everet. These might occasionally be from the Old English form of the name, Eoforheard (from eofor ‘boar’ + heard ‘hardy, brave’), but many bearers of this name were undoubtedly Normans, who took it from the cognate ancient Germanic Eburhard, Everhard.

nameMeanings.name: Averitt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of English   Averett  , a surname of English origin.

variants.name: Averitte
meanings: Variant of   Averitt  , a surname of English origin (see   Averett  ).

variants.name: Averett
meanings: Altered form of English   Everett   or   Avery  .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moira
meanings: Anglicized form of Irish Máire , now used throughout the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.description: Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

historicEvents.title: Rhode Island Declares Independence
historicEvents.description: Rhode Island declares independence from Great Britain on May 4, 1776, making it the first colony to do so officially.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Rhode Island Declares Independence from Great Britain

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Elizabeth Everitt Averitt was born in 1695, in Rhode Island, United States, her father, John Everitt, was 25 and her mother, Sarah Welles, was 22. She had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Adam Sheffield. She died in 1787, in Moore, North Carolina, United States, at the age of 92.

ja.Moore County, North Carolina, USA: アメリカ合衆国ノースカロライナ州ムーア
ja.lifeSummary: Mary Elizabeth Everitt Averittが1695年にアメリカ合衆国ロードアイランド州で生まれた時，父John Everittは25歳，母Sarah Wellesは22歳であった。彼女はAdam Sheffieldとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1787年にアメリカ合衆国ノースカロライナ州ムーアで92歳で死去した。

ko.Kingston, Washington, Rhode Island, Unit: 미국 로드아일랜드 주 와신그턴 소우스 킨그스타운 킨그스턴
ko.New Shoreham, Newport, Rhode Island: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 뉴포트 뉴 쇼레함
ko.Long Island City, Queens, New York City,: 미국 뉴욕 주 뉴 요르크 시티 퀸스 론그 이슬랜드 시티
ko.Block Island, Washington, Rhode Island,: 미국 로드아일랜드 주 와신그턴 블록 이슬랜드
ko.New Shoreham, Washington, Rhode Island,: 미국 로드아일랜드 주 와신그턴 뉴 쇼레함
ko.lifeSummary: Mary Elizabeth Everitt Averitt(이)가 1695년 미국 로드아일랜드 주에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Everitt(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah Welles(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 Adam Sheffield(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1787년 미국 노스캐롤라이나 주 무어에서 92세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Elizabeth Everitt Averitt nasceu em 1695, em Rhode Island, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, John Everitt, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Welles, tinha 22 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha com Adam Sheffield. Ela faleceu em 1787, em Moore, Carolina do Norte, Estados Unidos da América, com 92 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Elizabeth Everitt Averitt родилась в 1695 г. в местности Род-Айленд, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени John Everitt было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Welles, 22. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от Adam Sheffield. Она умерла в 1787 г. в местности мур, Северная Каролина, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 92 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Elizabeth Everitt Averitt nació en 1695, en Rhode Island, Estados Unidos, su papá, John Everitt, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Sarah Welles, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija con Adam Sheffield. Murió en 1787, en Moore, Carolina del Norte, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 92 años.
